# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	/usr/ports/www/WWW-Yandex-PhoneDetector/

#	/usr/ports/www/WWW-Yandex-PhoneDetector/pkg-plist
#	/usr/ports/www/WWW-Yandex-PhoneDetector/distinfo
#
echo c - /usr/ports/www/WWW-Yandex-PhoneDetector/
mkdir -p /usr/ports/www/WWW-Yandex-PhoneDetector/ > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/www/WWW-Yandex-PhoneDetector/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/www/WWW-Yandex-PhoneDetector/Makefile << '718d5e2a7ddb521dcd91c2b1e72918dd'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	p5-Yandex-PhoneDetector
X# Date Created:			29 Jul 2010
X# Whom:					Kostya Ten <kostya@cpan.ru>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	WWW-Yandex-PhoneDetector
XPORTVERSION=	1.04
XPORTREVISION=	1
XCATEGORIES=	www perl5
XMASTER_SITES=	CPAN
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
X
XMAINTAINER=	kostya@cpan.org
XCOMMENT=	Perl module to use Detector mobile phone
X
XRUN_DEPENDS=    ${SITE_PERL}/LWP/UserAgent.pm:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-LibXML:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-URI
XBUILD_DEPENDS=  ${RUN_DEPENDS}
X
XPERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
X
XMAN3=	WWW::Yandex::PhoneDetector
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
